creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is an ongoing project.  We've brought a lot of the former delegations into the FreeBSD.org zone directly but we don't have working contacts for many of the remaining ones.

Some of the <cc> delegations actually point to user groups rather than mirrors, so we can't simply garbage collect them.  There are also MX records under some delegations.

It's trickier than it looks.  But good to have a PR to keep our attention on this.
